_readme: RAG sources per persona. `youtube` = real video IDs (the 11-char id from a watch?v=<ID> URL) — the ingest script fetches their captions. `text` = manually curated verbatim snippets (e.g. real tweets/blog lines you paste in). Add your must-have videos here, then run `npm run ingest`. Empty arrays are fine — the app still runs on style alone.
